questionHtml:
A satellite X of mass m orbits the Earth with a period T. What will be the orbital period of satellite Y of mass 2m occupying the same orbit as X?

A.  T 2

B. T

C.  2 T

D. 2T

meta.title: A satellite X of mass m orbits the Earth with a period T. What will be the orbital period of satellite Y of mass 2m occupying the same orbit as X? A. T 2 B. T C. 2 T D. 2T
